_meta.author: arunachalam0606
_meta.title: Morphing Arrow Button
_meta.description:
A directional button that smoothly morphs on hover:
 - Starts as a circular icon
 - Expands outward in the given direction (left or right)
 - Adds a subtle animated line and arrow shift for a modern touch

Ideal for carousels, sliders, or navigation UIs where you want subtle motion without being intrusive.
